effects.mechanism: Contains non-heme iron (3.3 mg/100g). Absorption is 2-20% depending on meal composition. One cup cooked (198g) provides 6.6 mg iron.

modifiers.description: Vitamin C enhances non-heme iron absorption
Phytates in legumes can inhibit iron absorption

effects.notes: Good plant-based iron source, but absorption is lower than heme iron from meat.

sources.title: Iron Fact Sheet for Health Professionals - NIH

effects.mechanism: Excellent source of folate (181 mcg/100g). One cup cooked provides 358 mcg (90% DV).
effects.notes: One of the best plant-based folate sources.

sources.title: Folate Fact Sheet for Health Professionals - NIH

nutrition_sources.title: USDA FoodData Central - Lentils, mature seeds, cooked, boiled, without salt
